facebook.caption: Walked past the beach road and found this. Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu sits on 44 Võ Thị Sáu and most tourists never stop. A working temple, incense burning, locals praying. Feels nothing like the resort strip. 4.5 stars from 278 reviews and still off most itineraries. Add it between the beach and lunch. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Incense smoke, red lanterns, real locals mid-prayer. Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu is two streets from the tourist drag and almost no one visits. 4.5 stars. Zero queues.

instagram.caption:
Took a wrong turn on Võ Thị Sáu. Found Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu. 4.5★, 278 reviews, zero crowds.

instagram.video_caption: Incense, lanterns, locals praying. Don't walk past Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu.

tiktok.caption: Wrong turn. Best find. Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu is the real Phu Quoc. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
